typography.rules: Never center headings by default. Use fluid scales for large headings. Banned fonts: Inter, Roboto, Open Sans.

colors.rules: No full-screen gradients. Use International Klein Blue (#002FA7) strictly for primary actions. Text contrast must pass APCA.

spacing_and_layout.rules: Mobile-first. Use optical alignment. The Bento Grid Protocol applies for the public catalog view.

surfaces_and_borders.admin_cards: Flat background, 1px solid border-border, no shadow, square corners (rounded-none). Expose the grid skeleton.
surfaces_and_borders.public_header: Glassmorphism: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border/40 backdrop-saturate-150.
surfaces_and_borders.images: Product images must have max-h-[80vh], object-cover, and a subtle 1px inner stroke.
surfaces_and_borders.rules: Mix soft shadows with sharp inner contrasts only on interactive elements. Avoid muddy gray transparency.

components.buttons: Sharp corners (rounded-none). High contrast. Primary uses primary-DEFAULT, secondary uses transparent bg with 1px border-strong. Hover state: subtle lift (-translate-y-px) and explicit text color definition.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. border-collapse. No zebra striping, 1px bottom borders for rows. Left-align dense data.
components.forms: Shadcn inputs with square corners, 1px border. Focus state must use ring-2 ring-primary offset-0.
components.sidebar: Fixed left, width 260px, border-r border-border, dense navigation items. Use active state backgrounds.
components.rules: Use Shadcn logic but strip 'Vercel-look'. ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover.

animation_and_motion.page_transition: framer-motion fade in and slide up slightly (y: 10, opacity: 0)
animation_and_motion.rules: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Minimalist animations for dashboard, slightly more engaged for public catalog.

iconography.style: Regular for default, Duotone for active states. Install via `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.
iconography.rules: Dense dashboards and developer tools: use Phosphor Icons.

admin_dashboard.layout: Control Room grid. Fixed sidebar + Main content area. Grid borders style to expose the skeleton.
admin_dashboard.product_list: Data-dense table with inline edit capabilities or bulk select. Show SG Cost (hidden from public) and computed ONCOST price. Use 1px borders.
admin_dashboard.pricing_rules: Configuration cards for rules (e.g. +50 if < 1000, +100 if >= 1000). Explicit Active/Inactive toggles.
admin_dashboard.quotation_creator: Form heavy. Customer name, Location, MOQ fields. Product picker with search.

public_quotation.layout: Clean, minimal, Swiss poster aesthetic. Print-friendly. No sidebar. Centered bento/catalog grid for products.
public_quotation.header: ONCOST Brand text logo, Customer Name, Quotation ID, Date, Place. Large expressive typography for the Customer Name (e.g., text-5xl).
public_quotation.product_display: Generous spacing. Large product image, clear ONCOST pricing, MOQ. Strict rule: No mention of SG.
public_quotation.print_styles: Must include @media print queries to hide web-only UI elements (buttons, toggles, nav) and ensure proper pagination.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='pricing-rule-toggle', data-testid='product-card').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text must meet APCA standards. Hover & Focus states must have HIGHER contrast.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a full-stack app with FastAPI backend and React + Vite frontend using Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI. Use `.jsx`/`.js` extensions strictly, NO TypeScript (`.tsx`/`.ts`). Apply the Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) design: sharp square corners (rounded-none), crisp 1px borders, and a sterile, highly professional aesthetic. Build the admin dashboard for dense data management and the public quotation view as an elegant, print-ready, presentation-focused HTML catalog. Integrate the specified fonts and icons.
